transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang,
I ordered 2 Large orders of the Seafood Stew
Also, here we have Cockle Bibimbap (Mixed Rice)
Soy Sauce Marinated Shrimp Bibimbap
There were live baby octopus in the bag
I put it over there because I was scared
Let's put it in though
Let's heat it up first and then put the baby octopus in
Hello baby octopus
Are you an octopus?
I think it's dead, thankfully It's not moving
It looks like me?
Can't deny it
It's time for the octopus
Help me

It's trying to touch me
That's horrifying
I'm so sorry
That looks delicious
Bon appetit
The broth is lovely Is it because of all this seafood?
Dip it
It's so good
Very soft
Yum
The soup is really amazing
Let's put the sesame oil in here
In the cockle bibimbap
This is the cockle, this is the shrimp
I don't really enjoy eating cockle
Now I see why it was trending

Live octopus is the best
The head needs to be cooked more
The baby octopus is so tender and chewy
Abalone teeth are probably removed
In 1 bite
That's very nice
This is not a sponsored video
Cuttlefish cuttlefish
I'm so happy today
I just ordered what I was craving
The thickness is amazing on the cuttlefish
Dip it in the chojang (Red chili pepper paste with vinegar)
I got it from Young Yang Restaurant
The cuttlefish is really tender and it melts in my mouth
The legs So cute
Shrimp mixed rice this time

Looks good
That goes so well with the sesame oil
I had no idea
The crab is really big
Cut out the mouth
That's yummy
I can taste the intestines
Why's the crab meat so soft?
Were they alive too?
The crab meat melts too
Here we have the tiger shrimp
The shrimp meat is all broken up
Tasty
I have to eat it like this
Even the shell is edible It's very soft
Some more cockle bibimbap

Goni (Cod Roe)
I have kimchi sauce all over my sleeve
That's so tender
All shrimps are tasty
Look at this roe
It's so soft
1 Abalone
Carve it out
Ezpz
You need to cook and eat a live abalone
Amazing
It's so shocking that the roes are as good
The soup is amazing
It's not a webfoot octopus, it's a baby octopus
Huge
Crab meat

That's insane
1 more cuttlefish
Do you see how tender it is?
Really It's super soft
It just bites off
Take out the eyeballs,
The mouth I mean
I'll heat it up
Let's eat this while it heats up
Baby octopus
Guys, it's me
I didn't forget about the noodles
Let's take that out
These are hand-made noodles
Take out the head It's the best part
There's 1 more here

Oh no!
Where did it go?
Where are you?
Here it is
Octopus head
Do you guys see the intestines?
Crazy
Intestines
This is really nutty
[Chat: Isn't it gross?] No, only when it's alive
Look at the intestines
Take the head
This is exactly why I have the kimchi here
Perfect match
Abalone
Some noodles

It goes so well with the soup
That's so flavorful
1 last bite!
I'm too lazy to cook more Ramyun noodles
The soup is a little salty now
I will end it here
